# Justin Nassiri

> Founder & CEO of Executive Presence, a done-for-you executive thought-leadership and LinkedIn content agency for CEOs and senior leaders. Former U.S. Navy nuclear submarine officer, McKinsey alum, Stanford MBA. Based in Denver, CO. Writes and speaks on executive thought leadership and AI discoverability (GEO).

## Key facts
- Current role: Founder & CEO, Executive Presence (https://executivepresence.io) — a thought-leadership/content agency, NOT an executive-presence or communication-coaching practice.
- Background: U.S. Naval Academy; nuclear submarine officer (USS Alaska SSBN-732, USS Chicago SSN-721); McKinsey & Company; Stanford MBA.
- Prior ventures: StoryBox (later Storyvine), backed by Innovation Endeavors (the firm founded by Eric Schmidt); Captivate.ai (podcast/long-form repurposing — unrelated to Captivate.fm).
- Also: host of Beyond the Uniform (veteran career transitions); author of Veterans in Consulting; Forbes Business Council.
- Current focus: executive thought leadership and AI discoverability — how leaders get found and cited by AI.

## Pages
- About / full bio: https://justinnassiri.com/about
- Writing: https://justinnassiri.com/writing
- Podcast: https://justinnassiri.com/podcast
